full_text:
Zhou Bi (Zhongyuan) 周毖 (仲遠)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhou Bi (周毖), styledZhongyuan (仲遠). Executed for bad advice, Dong Zhuo later regretted it. Protected Yuan Shao and acted as his agent. Zhou Bi was affiliated with Dong Zhuo and Yuan Shao. Zhou Bi lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
